General.Name: Glory Flame Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Glory Flame Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides concrete demolition and construction engineering services in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company also manufactures and trades in prefabricated precast construction components. In addition, it engages in the research and sales of LED cultivation. Glory Flame Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Causeway Bay Plaza I, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
